atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS (v3).

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the `@layer` directive to tell Tailwind which "bucket" a set of custom styles belong to.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use `@apply` to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use `@config` to load a legacy JavaScript config file (Tailwind CSS v4).

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Use `@plugin` to load a Tailwind CSS plugin (Tailwind CSS v4).

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use `@theme` to define design tokens that become CSS variables and utilities (Tailwind CSS v4).

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Use `@utility` to define a custom utility class (Tailwind CSS v4).

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Deprecated. Use `@custom-variant` to define custom variants (Tailwind CSS v4).

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Use `@custom-variant` to define a custom variant (Tailwind CSS v4).

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Use `@source` to explicitly register source files for class detection (Tailwind CSS v4).

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Use `@reference` to import theme variables without duplicating CSS (Tailwind CSS v4).
